title: The Highest-Grossing Movie of 2025
text:
The surprise box office winner of 2025 is Ne Zha 2, a Chinese animated film that earned approximately $2.2 billion worldwide—nearly double the second-place finisher.

The Film: Ne Zha 2 is a sequel to the 2019 animated feature, produced by Chengdu Coco Cartoon and Beijing Enlight Media. The story centers on a mythological demon child character, directed by Jiaozi (Yu Yang).

Record-Breaking Achievement: The movie surpassed Inside Out 2 to become the highest-grossing animated movie of all time. It outperformed major blockbuster sequels including Zootopia 2 ($1.3 billion), Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning, Jurassic World: Rebirth, and Disney's Lilo & Stitch.

Why the Success: Critics praised its epic battle scenes and spellbinding graphics, along with strong cultural resonance in China. A24 Films boosted its U.S. reach in August by releasing an English dub featuring Michelle Yeoh as the lead character's mother, alongside other voice actors.

International Appeal: The film earned just $23 million domestically, demonstrating how international markets—particularly China—drove its unprecedented global success. The movie became available on HBO Max in December 2025.
